title: tiquilia hunteri
intro: Tiquilia hunteri, also known as Hunter's Tiquilia or Hunter's Tiquilea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Tiquilia hunteri can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues.
